creator: tass@kenderhome.com
text:
Section 1.6 of the FAQ (http://www.freebsd.org/FAQ/install.html) has a reference to /usr/src/release/floppies/Makefile for information on how to make custom install floppies. This src path has not existed since FreeBSD 3.x and grreater.

Fix: 

Remove section 1.6 and leave a "*" in its place, or find someone that knows how to do this and get them to make an entry.
